title: feedback_positive_fb_1782397477065_xbocno
content: {"id":"fb_1782397477065_xbocno","signal":"positive","context":"Strategic decision: Deferred Fly.io cloud relay to prioritize manual Reddit/GitHub outreach. Root cause of stuck sending: Mac load average was high (11.41) due to Cursor Helper (PID 9452 at 103% CPU), causing local Ollama API requests (10k+ token context evaluation) to time out. Fix: Reduced CHAT_STREAM_FIRST_BYTE_MS from 120s to 30s and CHAT_STREAM_IDLE_MS from 90s to 30s in hermesGatewayClient.ts to fail-fast. Verified: 557 Jest unit tests passing. Tags: mac-performance, diagnosis, mac-freeze-rescue, ollama-timeout, strategic-decision.","submittedContext":"Strategic decision: Deferred Fly.io cloud relay to prioritize manual Reddit/GitHub outreach. Root cause of stuck sending: Mac load average was high (11.41) due to Cursor Helper (PID 9452 at 103% CPU), causing local Ollama API requests (10k+ token context evaluation) to time out. Fix: Reduced CHAT_STREAM_FIRST_BYTE_MS from 120s to 30s and CHAT_STREAM_IDLE_MS from 90s to 30s in hermesGatewayClient.ts to fail-fast. Verified: 557 Jest unit tests passing. Tags: mac-performance, diagnosis, mac-freeze-rescue, ollama-timeout, strategic-decision.","relatedFeedbackId":null,"lastAction":null,"whatWentWrong":null,"whatToChange":null,"whatWorked":null,"reasoning":null,"visualEvidence":null,"conversationWindow":null,"distillation":null,"tags":[],"skill":null,"failureType":null,"rubric":null,"actionType":"store-learning","actionReason":null,"structuredRule":null,"gateAction":null,"timestamp":"2026-06-25T14:24:37.065Z","richContext":{"domain":"testing","filePaths":[],"errorType":null,"outcomeCategory":"standard-success","enforcement":{"scopeViolation":false,"approvalFailure":false,"protectedFileViolation":false,"protectedFiles":[]}}}
